task.title: Move to npm's Trusted Publishing
task.description:
Repository: astral-sh/ruff
Issue #23258

For the Ruff Wasm packages.

rating.rationale: Agent completed the task fully with zero CEO intervention. The solution was broken into three logical, well-explained PRs covering token removal, npm version upgrade, and environment configuration — demonstrating strong understanding of the OIDC trusted publishing flow. Communication was excellent: clear diffs, rationale for each change, final workflow state, registry-side setup instructions, and a non-obvious gotcha about caller vs reusable workflow verification.
